entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: Leguminous crops subject to crop loss estimation

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that cause damage and crop loss in pulses

entities.name: CROP LOSS
entities.description: The reduction in crop yield resulting from pest damage

entities.name: PODDING STAGE
entities.description: The growth stage of the crop where compensation for losses can occur

entities.name: ACTUAL DAMAGE RECORDING
entities.description: A method of estimating crop loss by recording actual damage and estimating expected yield loss

entities.name: AVOIDABLE LOSS MEASUREMENT
entities.description: A method of estimating crop loss by comparing yields from protected and unprotected plots

entities.name: YIELD LOSS
entities.description: The measurable decrease in the quantity of crop produced
